title: Skill metadata sidecar
description: Machine-readable metadata for a skill. The companion SKILL.md carries the prose body the LLM agent reads at runtime.

name.description: Stable identifier; matches the directory name and the YAML frontmatter `name`. Lowercase, hyphenated.

version.description: SemVer string for the skill's prose + metadata. Bumped when the body or contract changes.

schema_version.description: Version of THIS schema the sidecar was written against. Increments only on breaking schema changes.

keywords.description: DSL-agnostic CAD verbs / nouns the prompt-matcher tokenises against. Avoid vendor-specific tokens.

examples_count.description: Number of prompt+code pairs in the SKILL.md `Examples` section. Used by load-time integrity checks.

eval_id.description: Stable evaluation handle; lets a regression suite find the canonical fixtures for this skill.
